title: Avoid using list() when iterating over an iterable object
description: Using list() can lead to unnecessary memory usage when iterating over an iterable object that does not need to be converted into a list.
message: Avoid using list() when iterating over an iterable object
recommendation: Use built-in for loop or list comprehension instead of using list()

noncompliant.description: Using list() when iterating over an iterable object

compliant.description: Iterating over an iterable object directly using for loop

compliant.code: [i for i in iterable] if condition
compliant.description: Using list comprehension instead of list()

why_is_this_an_issue: Using list() can lead to unnecessary memory usage when iterating over an iterable object that does not need to be converted into a list.
how_to_fix: Use built-in for loop or list comprehension instead of using list()
